2604.19667.title: Chat2Workflow: A Benchmark for Generating Executable Visual Workflows with Natural Language
2604.19667.paper_summary: At present, executable visual workflows have emerged as a mainstream paradigm in real-world industrial deployments, offering strong reliability and controllability. However, in current practice, such workflows are almost entirely constructed through manual engineering: developers must carefully design workflows, write prompts for each step, and repeatedly revise the logic as requirements evolve-making development costly, time-consuming, and error-prone. To study whether large language models can automate this multi-round interaction process, we introduce Chat2Workflow, a benchmark for generating executable visual workflows directly from natural language, and propose a robust agentic framework to mitigate recurrent execution errors. Chat2Workflow is built from a large collection of real-world business workflows, with each instance designed so that the generated workflow can be transformed and directly deployed to practical workflow platforms such as Dify and Coze. Experimental results show that while state-of-the-art language models can often capture high-level intent, they struggle to generate correct, stable, and executable workflows, especially under complex or changing requirements. Although our agentic framework yields up to 5.34% resolve rate gains, the remaining real-world gap positions Chat2Workflow as a foundation for advancing industrial-grade automation. Code is available at https://github.com/zjunlp/Chat2Workflow.
2604.19667.paper_summary_zh: 目前，可執行的視覺工作流程已成為現實工業部署中的主流範式，提供強大的可靠性和可控性。<lb/>然而，在當前的實踐中，這些工作流程幾乎完全是通過手動工程構建的：開發者必須仔細設計工作流程，為每個步驟編寫提示，並隨著需求的演變不斷修訂邏輯，這使得開發成本高昂、耗時且易出錯。<lb/>為了研究大型語言模型是否可以自動化這一多輪互動過程，我們介紹了 Chat2Workflow，這是一個直接從自然語言生成可執行視覺工作流程的基準，並提出了一個穩健的代理框架以減輕重複執行錯誤。<lb/>Chat2Workflow 是基於大量現實商業工作流程構建的，每個實例的設計使得生成的工作流程可以轉換並直接部署到實際的工作流程平台，如 Dify 和 Coze。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，儘管最先進的語言模型通常能捕捉高層次的意圖，但在生成正確、穩定且可執行的工作流程方面卻面臨挑戰，尤其是在複雜或變化的需求下。<lb/>儘管我們的代理框架提高了高達 5.34% 的解決率增益，但剩餘的現實差距使 Chat2Workflow 成為推進工業級自動化的基礎。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/Chat2Workflow 獲得。
2604.19667.author: Yi Zhong et.al.
2604.19667.authors: Yi Zhong, Buqiang Xu, Yijun Wang, Zifei Shan, Shuofei Qiao, Guozhou Zheng, Ningyu Zhang
